nasb.text: having the glory of God. Her brilliance was like a very costly stone, as a stone of crystal-clear jasper.

esv.text: having the glory of God, its radiance like a most rare jewel, like a jasper, clear as crystal.

cnv.text: 這城有　神的榮耀，城的光輝好像極貴的寶石，又像晶瑩的碧玉。

ccb.text: 城中充满上帝的荣光，璀璨如贵重的宝石，晶莹如碧玉。

csbs.text: 这城有神的荣耀，她的光辉仿佛极贵重的宝石，如同碧玉，清澈如水晶。
